From Stdlib           Require Import List.
From MetaRocq.Common  Require Import BasicAst Kernames Universes.
From MetaRocq.Utils   Require Import bytestring.
From MetaRocq.Erasure Require Import EAst ExAst.
From Agda2Lambox      Require Import CheckWF Eval.
Import ListNotations.

Definition env : global_env :=
  [(((MPfile ["PartialAppM"%bs; "SomeNat"%bs], "someNat"%bs), true),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tLambda
                nAnon
                (tCase
                   ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["PartialAppM"%bs], "SomeNat"%bs);
                       inductive_ind := 0 |},
                    0)
                   (tRel 0) [([nAnon], tRel 0)]));
         cst_type :=
           ([],
            TArr
              (TInd
                 {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["PartialAppM"%bs], "SomeNat"%bs);
                    inductive_ind := 0 |})
              (TInd
                 {| inductive_mind :=
                      (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                    inductive_ind := 0 |})) |});
   (((MPfile ["PartialAppM"%bs], "test"%bs), true),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tApp
                (tApp
                   (tConst
                      (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs],
                       "\1366_\1366plus_"%bs))
                   (tApp
                      (tApp
                         (tConst
                            (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs],
                             "\1366_\1366plus_"%bs))
                         (tApp
                            (tApp
                               (tConst
                                  (MPfile ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs; "Nat"%bs],
                                   "\1366_\1366plus_"%bs))

                                                             (tConst
                                                                (MPfile
                                                                   ["Agda"%bs; "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                    "Nat"%bs],
                                                                 "\1366_\1366plus_"%bs))
                                                             (tApp
                                                                (tApp
                                                                   (tLambda
                                                                      nAnon
                                                                      (tLambda nAnon (tRel 1)))
                                                                   (tApp
                                                                      (tConstruct
                                                                         {| inductive_mind :=
                                                                              (MPfile
                                                                                 ["Agda"%bs;
                                                                                  "Builtin"%bs;
                                                                                  "Nat"%bs],
                                                                               "Nat"%bs);
                                                                            inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                                                         1 [])
